# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { get } from '@vercel/edge-config';
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';

interface Config {
  API_KEY?: string;
  DB_URL?: string;
  FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI?: boolean;
  FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS?: boolean;
  FEATURE_FLAG_BETA_FEATURES?: boolean;
  MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE?: number;
  CACHE_TTL?: number;
}

const DEFAULT_CONFIG: Config = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI: false,
  FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS: true,
  FEATURE_FLAG_BETA_FEATURES: false,
  MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE: 100,
  CACHE_TTL: 3600,
};

async function getConfig(): Promise<Config> {
  const config: Config = { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG };

  if (!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG) {
    return config;
  }

  try {
    const apiKey = await get<string>('API_KEY');
    if (apiKey !== undefined) config.API_KEY = apiKey;

    const dbUrl = await get<string>('DB_URL');
    if (dbUrl !== undefined) config.DB_URL = dbUrl;

    const featureFlagNewUI = await get<boolean>('FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI');
    if (featureFlagNewUI !== undefined) config.FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI = featureFlagNewUI;

    const featureFlagAnalytics = await get<boolean>('FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS');
    if (featureFlagAnalytics !== undefined) config.FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS = featureFlagAnalytics;

    const featureFlagBeta = await get<boolean>('FEATURE_FLAG_BETA_FEATURES');
    if (featureFlagBeta !== undefined) config.FEATURE_FLAG_BETA_FEATURES = featureFlagBeta;

    const maxRequests = await get<number>('MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE');
    if (maxRequests !== undefined) config.MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE = maxRequests;

    const cacheTTL = await get<number>('CACHE_TTL');
    if (cacheTTL !== undefined) config.CACHE_TTL = cacheTTL;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error reading from Edge Config:', error);
  }

  return config;
}

export default async function handler(req: NextRequest) {
  const config = await getConfig();

  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const action = url.searchParams.get('action');

  if (action === 'config') {
    return NextResponse.json({
      config: {
        ...config,
        API_KEY: config.API_KEY ? '***' + config.API_KEY.slice(-4) : undefined,
        DB_URL: config.DB_URL ? config.DB_URL.replace(/:[^:@]+@/, ':***@') : undefined,
      },
      source: process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? 'edge-config' : 'defaults',
    });
  }

  if (action === 'features') {
    return NextResponse.json({
      features: {
        newUI: config.FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI,
        analytics: config.FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS,
        betaFeatures: config.FEATURE_FLAG_BETA_FEATURES,
      },
    });
  }

  if (action === 'db-connect') {
    return NextResponse.json({
      message: 'Database connection simulated',
      dbUrl: config.DB_URL ? config.DB_URL.replace(/:[^:@]+@/, ':***@') : undefined,
      status: 'connected',
    });
  }

  if (action === 'api-call') {
    return NextResponse.json({
      message: 'API call simulated',
      apiKeyUsed: config.API_KEY ? '***' + config.API_KEY.slice(-4) : undefined,
      status: 'success',
    });
  }

  if (action === 'limits') {
    return NextResponse.json({
      maxRequestsPerMinute: config.MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE,
      cacheTTL: config.CACHE_TTL,
    });
  }

  return NextResponse.json({
    message: 'Edge Function with Edge Config',
    availableActions: ['config', 'features', 'db-connect', 'api-call', 'limits'],
    usage: 'Add ?action=<action> to the URL',
    edgeConfigEnabled: !!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG,
  });
}

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};
